name: /prompt-eval: reads the corresponding evals/datasets/agents/<agent>.jsonl as the input set
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && echo '{"bootstrap_seed":true,"input":"x","expected":"y"}' > evals/datasets/agents/review-types.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" review-types --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep "evals/datasets/agents/review-types.jsonl" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
